title: This Is Bad... They Just Shut Down FABLE 5
summary: Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models were shut down after three days following US government order. The video argues this signals a broader pattern where frontier AI models may face government restrictions, raising questions about public access to powerful AI systems and government control over frontier AI deployment.
writeup: The video reports that Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models were shut down three days after launch following a US government order. It frames the event as a potential pattern in which frontier AI models could face government restrictions on deployment. The argument centers on what such intervention implies for public access to powerful AI systems and for government control over how frontier models reach users.
